prompt: Create a photorealistic cinematic portrait of a stylish young man sitting calmly inside the wide-open mouth of a gigantic crocodile or alligator on a shallow reflective salt flat at golden hour. The man is centered in the lower half of the vertical frame, seated casually with knees bent, one arm resting on a knee and the other hand relaxed between his legs, looking toward the camera with a composed natural expression. Dress him in exactly 4 visible clothing pieces: an ivory linen blazer, an open-collar white shirt, loose ivory trousers with rolled cuffs, and clean white low-top sneakers. The reptile is enormous, hyper-detailed, and wraps around him like a living cave, with rough dark gray-green pebbled scales, a massive upper jaw looming overhead, a cavernous brown mouth interior behind him, and exactly 30 visible conical ivory teeth: 18 teeth on the upper jaw and 12 teeth on the lower jaw, varied in size and irregularly spaced. Place the scene on a wet desert playa or salt flat with thin water reflections, distant low mountains on the horizon, and a warm yellow-orange sunset sky. Use dramatic low-angle natural light from the left, warm rim lighting on the man’s suit and the crocodile teeth, shallow depth of field, realistic skin and fabric texture, sharp reptile scale detail, cinematic color grading, 3:4 vertical composition, no text, no watermark, no fantasy illustration style.
